WorkSpeedModifier.title: Work speed modifier
WorkSpeedModifier.description: Adjusts the speed at which this creature can do work related tasks.

LearningModifier.title: Learning modifier
LearningModifier.description: Adjusts the amount of experience gained.

PainThresholdModifier.title: Pain threshold modifier
PainThresholdModifier.description: Adjusts the point at which a character will pass out from pain.

BribePriceModifier.title: Bribe price modifier
BribePriceModifier.description: Adjusts how many coins are required to bribe someone.
